name: BrightEdge SEO Intelligence API
what_it_does: BrightEdge REST API for enterprise SEO platform with AI-driven content intelligence and keyword ranking data. Enables AI agents to manage organic keyword ranking monitoring and tracking automation, handle share of voice and competitive organic presence analysis, access content recommendations and SEO opportunity scoring, retrieve page-level performance data and crawl issue detection, manage site audit and technical SEO issue tracking, handle local SEO and location-level ranking data, access DataMind AI-powered ranking change anomaly detection, retrieve backlink data and domain authority metrics, manage content optimization scoring and recommendation workflows, and integrate SEO intelligence data with content management, analytics, and digital marketing platforms.
use_cases: Monitoring keyword rankings from SEO automation agents
Tracking share of voice changes from competitive intelligence agents
Surfacing content gaps from content strategy agents
Alerting on ranking drops from SEO monitoring agents
not_for: SMB or individual SEO without enterprise-scale keyword portfolio needs
PPC and paid search without organic SEO focus
Technical site monitoring without SEO keyword and content intelligence context
best_when: An enterprise SEO or content marketing team using BrightEdge wants AI agents to automate ranking monitoring, competitive share of voice tracking, content opportunity identification, and SEO reporting.
avoid_when: DATA LATENCY: BrightEdge ranking data is refreshed periodically (not real-time) — ranking changes visible after refresh cycle. Automated content decisions based on SEO data alone risk poor user experience; combine with engagement and conversion data. Enterprise platform requires significant onboarding; API access requires account configuration and keyword portfolio setup.

auth.notes: BrightEdge uses API key authentication. Per-account credentials with account-level and user-level access. Developer documentation requires customer portal access. REST API with JSON responses. No native webhooks — scheduled export pattern for data pipeline integration. Data cube export API for large dataset extraction. S3 data export option for bulk keyword data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; keyword volume and features determine pricing
pricing.notes: Foster City, California. Founded 2007. Private ($42M funding). Enterprise SEO market leader. 1,700+ global brands. Strong in enterprise retail, finance, and media. AI-driven content recommendations via DataMind. First to market with enterprise share of voice metrics. Competes with SEMrush and Conductor for enterprise SEO platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk data via scheduled data cube export

known_agent_gotchas: DATA LATENCY: Ranking data refreshes periodically (daily/weekly); automated monitoring should account for data freshness timestamps before alerting
Customer portal required — developer documentation and API keys require active customer account; no public API documentation
Data cube API for bulk export — high-volume keyword data requires scheduled data cube export pattern rather than real-time API calls
Keyword portfolio setup — API access is scoped to configured keyword portfolio; new keywords require BrightEdge campaign configuration before data is available
S3 export option — bulk historical ranking data available via S3 bucket export; more efficient than API for large dataset ingestion
Domain verification — tracked domains must be verified via Google Search Console or DNS verification before ranking data is available
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise SEO data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Keyword ranking and competitive SEO intelligence.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEO intelligence data. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US. Keyword ranking and competitive data.
